description_long: This is a wooden chair with a unique, modern design featuring an asymmetrical backrest composed of three horizontal slats, two of which are angled. The seat is rectangular and flat, made from the same wood as the rest of the chair, and the surface displays a visible wood grain texture. The chair has four legs, but one front leg is angled outward, giving it an unconventional and artistic appearance. The backrest is solid and extends vertically, providing support for the upper back. The overall finish is matte, with a dark brown color dominating the entire structure. This chair would likely be found in urban parks, outdoor cafes, or creative public spaces.
description: A modern wooden chair with an asymmetrical slatted backrest, angled front leg, and a matte dark brown wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the asymmetrical backrest slats and the outward-angled left front leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the flat seat and the thickness of the wooden panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid backrest and the alignment of the rear legs.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the straight right front leg and the overall rectangular seat profile.
